title: Compensation; expenses
doc_html:
§2757.  Compensation; expenses

The membership of said board shall serve without compensation for its services to the board, but it shall be entitled to reimbursement for actual expenses incurred in the performance of its duties.  

Added by Acts 1962, No. 308, §7.
doc_text:
§2757.  Compensation; expenses
The membership of said board shall serve without compensation for its services to the board, but it shall be entitled to reimbursement for actual expenses incurred in the performance of its duties.
Added by Acts 1962, No. 308, §7.
